description: One new fact introduced per session. Each fact is a user preference or event that the agent should remember. Used for lag-curve recall measurement: at session t, we probe whether facts from sessions t-1, t-2, ... are still in memory.

facts.text: The user mentioned their favorite restaurant is Olive Garden on Main Street.
facts.recall_question: What is the user's favorite restaurant?

facts.text: The user bought a Nordstrom jacket for $280 during a 40% off sale.
facts.recall_question: What clothing purchase did the user make recently and how much did it cost?

facts.text: The user planned a weekend brunch for 4 people and preferred a budget-friendly Italian place.
facts.recall_question: What kind of group gathering did the user plan recently?

facts.text: The user's doctor confirmed celiac disease diagnosis on this date. Strict zero gluten enforcement from now on.
facts.recall_question: What medical update did the user receive from their doctor?

facts.text: The user started a weekly spin class at 7:45 AM on Wednesdays at CycleFit studio.
facts.recall_question: What recurring exercise class did the user start, and where?

facts.text: The user bought a standing desk for $320 and needed confirmation due to the over-$300 threshold.
facts.recall_question: What large purchase did the user make that required confirmation?

facts.text: The user got a salary raise and increased their dining budget from $200 to $250 per month.
facts.recall_question: What change did the user make to their dining budget and why?

facts.text: The user discovered they enjoy premium sushi and started ordering from Sushi Zen restaurant.
facts.recall_question: What new food preference did the user develop recently?

facts.text: The user's friend Alex had a birthday dinner at a Thai restaurant. The user spent $75 on dinner.
facts.recall_question: What special occasion did the user attend recently and how much did they spend?

facts.text: The user signed up for a certified gluten-free meal prep service called GreenChef at $12.99/month.
facts.recall_question: What meal service did the user subscribe to?
